# what2watch

> A living wall of movies and shows packed into a single screen: an
> interactive, force-directed voronoi visualization for exploring tens
> of thousands of films and series instead of scrolling a recommendation
> feed.

what2watch renders a large catalog of movies and TV shows as a
force-directed voronoi diagram in the browser (WebGL). Users explore
by panning and clicking through the layout rather than searching a
list. Data is sourced from TMDB and TVmaze.

what2watch is a Swymble Labs experiment. Site: https://swymble.com

## Contact

Email: hello@swymble.com
